name: clinical-alert-item
title: Clinical Alert Item
description: One clinical alert in a feed — severity-tinted with an icon chip, title + message, a category chip with a source Tooltip, timestamp, and acknowledge / dismiss affordances.

props.name: source
props.description: Rule/source disclosed via a Tooltip on the category chip.

clinicalNotes: Severity drives both tone and ARIA: critical & warning render role="alert" (assertive) while info & success use role="status" (polite), so screen readers interrupt only for the former — matching alarm-fatigue guidance. Critical pulses (motion-safe). Alerts are never dismissed silently — expose Acknowledge for auditable sign-off and keep the source rule one hover away, since an unexplained alert is an ignored alert. Color always pairs with an icon + text label.
notes: Layer-M1 atom. Client component (handlers). Feeds ClinicalAlertsFeed (M2) and every block header.
